entry.title: SAP Cloud Print Manager with SAP S/4HANA on-premises - Business user as print user
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4HANA on-premises and recently decided to install SAP Cloud Print Manager since it is now compatible with on-premises installations of S/4HANA.

In addition, we use the centralized printing system "Uniflow" (Canon) which allows the end users to start a print from S/4 and to decide afterwards on which printer the document will be printed by using their badge to "authenticate" them at the printer.

We would like to keep this mechanism with SAP S/4HANA on-premises and the SAP Cloud Print Manager. Therefore, we need that business users are used by the SAP Cloud Print Manager as print user to send the print to the Uniflow server and not a technical user.

Is there any working configuration that we can use to implement a solution ?

entry.title: Im Interview mit Robin Janßen: Mein Weg in die SAP Beratung bei BearingPoint
entry.content:
Im Interview mit Robin Janßen, Senior Consultant bei BearingPoint.

Bitte beschreibe deinen Weg zu BearingPoint und zum Thema SAP Beratung.

Nach meinem Studium bin ich als Controller in einem mittelständigen Unternehmen gestartet. Innerhalb der vier Jahre, die ich dort tätig war, hatte ich meine ersten Kontaktpunkte mit SAP – zunächst als Anwender und in den letzten 12 Monaten als Teil eines internen Projektteams für eine SAP S/4HANA Einführung. Dabei habe ich sowohl SAP als Technologie, aber auch das Projektumfeld für mich entdeckt. Im Rahmen meines berufsbegleitenden Masters ist dann der erste Kontakt mit BearingPoint über Kommiliton:innen entstanden. Deren Einblicke in ihren Berufsalltag haben mich dazu motiviert, den Schritt als „Quereinsteiger“ in die SAP-Beratung zu wagen. 

Warum arbeitest du gerne im Consulting?

Consulting ist einfach unglaublich vielfältig! Man ist durchgehend mit neuen und komplexen Themen konfrontiert, die einen nie langweilen und auch persönlich weiterbringen. Das ist natürlich manchmal herausfordernd und man wird auch mal ins kalte Wasser geworfen, aber dadurch lernt man immer mehr dazu und kann das Skill Set erweitern – eine super Chance, sich persönlich und beruflich weiterzuentwickeln!

Gleichzeitig habe ich die Möglichkeit, eigene Impulse zu setzen. Wenn neue Technologien oder Trends am Markt entstehen, kann man sich direkt einbringen und einen Beitrag zur Service-Entwicklung leisten. So kann ich mein persönliches Interesse an Themen rund um Innovation mit meinem Beruf verbinden.

Wie hat dir BearingPoint dabei geholfen, dich fachlich im SAP Consulting weiterzuentwickeln?

Durch meinen Hintergrund im Controlling war für mich von Anfang an klar, dass ich im Bereich SAP CO – dem SAP Controlling-Modul – tätig sein möchte.

Im Hinblick auf die Prozesse und Anforderungen an das System konnte ich zwar einiges an Vorwissen mitbringen, aber um die Kunden wirklich umfassend zu beraten, fehlte mir tiefergehendes SAP-spezifisches Wissen.

Hier hat mich BearingPoint durch verschiedene Maßnahmen unterstützt und dazu befähigt, im Projektalltag durchzustarten: Zum einen habe ich direkt zum Einstieg bei BearingPoint an unserer internen SAP S/4HANA Academy teilgenommen. Diese hat mich fit für den Einsatz beim Kunden gemacht. Die Academy geht über sechs Wochen und bietet einen umfassenden Einblick in alle Facetten des SAP Systems. Sie ist eine super Möglichkeit, inhaltlich tief in SAP einzusteigen und sich gleichzeitig ein Netzwerk an Kolleg:innen aufzubauen, die ebenfalls im SAP Consulting tätig sind. Es gibt immer wieder Momente, in denen wir uns bis heute gegenseitig bei Fragen oder Kundenherausforderungen unterstützen. Denn Knowledge-Sharing is Caring. 😉 Gleichzeitig bereitet die Academy auf eine SAP-Zertifizierung vor, die Teilnehmende am Ende der sechs Wochen ablegen können.

Zusätzlich zur SAP S/4HANA Academy habe ich an einem SAP CO-Deep Dive teilgenommen. Hier haben wir uns mehrere Wochen intensiv mit dem Modul CO beschäftigt und alle Bereiche mit theoretischem Hintergrundwissen als auch praktischen Übungen in einer Testumgebung beleuchtet.

Neben dem Schulungsangebot gibt es in den Projekten außerdem auch immer die Möglichkeit, erfahrenere Kolleg:innen zu fragen und so auch am internen Knowledge-Pool zu partizipieren.

Innerhalb welcher Branche arbeitest du? Was begeistert dich an diesen Themen?

Ich arbeite im Bereich Automotive & Industrial Manufacturing. Wir beraten vor allem Automobilhersteller und Zulieferer, aber auch große Fertigungsunternehmen.

Dieser Bereich ist sehr spannend, da produzierende Unternehmen oft komplexe Wertschöpfungsketten haben und ein SAP-Projekt nicht nur die Einführung einer neuen Software bedeutet, sondern die Transformation eben dieser Wertschöpfungskette damit einhergeht. Unser Ziel ist es, nicht nur die „neueste Version" von SAP zu installieren, sondern gemeinsam mit dem Kunden die bestehenden Prozesse zu hinterfragen und mit Hilfe von SAP bessere und effizientere Lösungen für diese Herausforderungen zu finden.

Ein – aus meiner Sicht – zweiter großer Vorteil der Branche ist die Internationalität der Kunden. Auch wenn der Hauptsitz oft in Deutschland ist, sind die Produktionsstandorte über die ganze Welt verteilt und die Projekte dementsprechend international strukturiert.

Welche Pläne hast du für deine weitere Karriere bei BearingPoint?

Aktuell bin ich als Senior Business Consultant im Bereich CO in einer großen SAP-Transformation tätig und möchte zunächst den Kunden bei dieser Transformation erfolgreich begleiten. Mittelfristig kann ich mir aber auch gut vorstellen, mehr Verantwortung im (Teil-)Projektmanagement zu übernehmen und damit auch den Schritt in Richtung Manager – der nächste Karriereschritt mit Führungs- und Akquiseverantwortung – zu gehen.

Unabhängig von Ebenen und Themen freue ich mich aber vor allem darauf, regelmäßig neue Kunden zu beraten und Herausforderungen zu meistern. Außerdem hoffe ich, im Rahmen internationaler Projekte ins Ausland zu reisen, um Kunden vor Ort zu beraten und so neue Kulturen und Länder kennenzulernen. Ich könnte mir auch vorstellen, für BearingPoint für eine gewisse Zeit in ein anderes internationales Büro zu wechseln, um noch mehr Auslandserfahrung zu sammeln.

Das Wichtigste ist jedoch, dass ich weiterhin Spaß an meinem Job und meinen Aufgaben habe – und der Rest wird sich immer im Dialog mit meinem Projektleiter und Development Manager ergeben.  

Wie würdest du dein Team beschreiben?

Mein Team ist weltklasse! Wir ergänzen uns sowohl von Themenschwerpunkten als auch persönlich perfekt. Auch unser Partner und mein Manager meistern es sehr gut, ein Gleichgewicht zwischen Führungsverantwortung und Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe aufrechtzuerhalten.

Aber auch außerhalb des direkten Teams sind die Kolleg:innen klasse – und durch Schulungen, lokale oder branchenspezifische Events sowie natürlich die Projekteinsätze fördert BearingPoint den Austausch über das eigene Team hinaus.

„Together, we are more than business.” – was bedeutet unser Purpose für dich persönlich?

Es bedeutet für mich primär, dass wir alle an einem Strang ziehen – um einerseits unsere Projekte voranzubringen und andererseits gemeinsam Ziele zu erreichen. Ohne Ellenbogenkultur oder ähnliches.

Wir helfen uns gegenseitig und nehmen uns gerne auch mal jenseits der Arbeit Zeit, um mit Kolleg:innen über persönlichen Themen zu sprechen und gemeinsame Interessen zu diskutieren. Insbesondere After Works, lokale Communities oder Teamevents fördern diese super Kultur aktiv!

Das klingt interessant und du möchtest mehr zu Jobmöglichkeiten bei BearingPoint erfahren? Hier geht's zu unseren aktuell ausgeschriebenen Positionen.

entry.title: Extract sap success factors data and load into any database using sap bods

Good day,

Team can we you please help guide me how to extract the data success factors data using sap bods.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Extract sap success factors data and load into any da...
entry.content:
Here is the documentation on connecting to SuccessFactors from Data Services - 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/1bf3d60cfc604c528084ae59e7662156/577d551d6d6d1014b3fc9283b0e91070.html

 

You can also use any odata endpoint in Data Services  -

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/1bf3d60cfc604c528084ae59e7662156/789dcf29ad3b497490c51bc785c743da.html

 

Best Regards,

Denise
SAP Support

entry.title: 🚀 Exciting Course Alert: Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite 🚀
entry.content:
Exciting news for those looking to enhance their integration expertise! Starting August 28, 2024, SAP is offering a free learning course titled "Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite." This course provides a thorough introduction to SAP Integration Suite and its transformative capabilities.

Course Overview

The course covers essential aspects of SAP Integration Suite, including:

  • Key Capabilities: Learn about the core features of SAP Integration Suite and how they streamline integration processes.
  • Enterprise-Wide Integration Strategy: Understand the critical role of a well-defined integration strategy in today’s digital landscape.
  • AI and iPaaS Integration: Explore how artificial intelligence and SAP’s integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) can modernize and innovate your enterprise.

Why Enroll?

  • Accelerate Cloud Migration: Implement a hybrid integration approach to speed up your transition to the cloud.
  • Enhance Business Agility: Utilize the diverse tools and prepackaged content of SAP Integration Suite to boost business responsiveness.
  • Modernize Your Enterprise: Leverage SAP’s iPaaS to transform your organization into an intelligent, modern enterprise.

Join the Discussion

The course includes access to an online discussion forum from August 28 to September 30, 2024. Engage with SAP experts, ask questions, and collaborate with fellow learners to enrich your understanding.

Register Now

Don’t miss this opportunity to advance your skills with SAP. Sign up today and start your journey to mastering SAP Integration Suite!

What is the version of SAP Service and Asset Manager deployed in Mobile Services?
Has Metadata deployed to App Update in mobile services?

Sahil

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Sales Order text line interface back to Delivery Note
entry.content:
Hi WGrey,

Can you please help to share the screenshots showing the issue?

What is meant by: all the Predefined text is gone?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementati...
entry.content:
You've raised some excellent points. While having IT certifications from various vendors like Microsoft, Google, Amazon, CompTIA, Cisco, and SAP, SAP's certification process presents some unique challenges.

The course material often lacks polish and clarity, and the quizzes are designed differently than those from other vendors. The requirement to achieve a perfect score on these quizzes can be frustrating and demotivating, especially when answers may contradict each other or multiple options could be correct.

Moreover, after completing the quizzes, SAP fails to provide adequate feedback or explanations. This lack of clarification undermines the effectiveness of the learning process. If SAP, the creator of its own products and certification program, cannot provide comprehensive explanations for its quizzes, it's difficult to imagine who else could. This deficiency significantly hinders positive learning and effective training.

entry.title: Re: Service and Asset Manager - notficiation type not app...

Regards,

Sahil

entry.title: how to see quantity per warehouse in list of items
entry.content:
Dear all,

In SAP B1 when creating a sales order, we have a row called 'In Stock'. But certain items we have in 2 different warehouses. How can I see change the view of this list, so I can see:

- Total stock

- Stock WHS 1

- Stock WHS 2 etc, etc,

I hope you can help me.

Regards, Mark

entry.title: Re: Application for digital skills initiative

entry.title: Re: What are the advantages of upgrading to larger page size from 2K to larger page size?
entry.content: There can be multiple reasons for increasing page size. I would encourage reviewing the documentation at: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/91d32d977a174c68829880bc020fc352/a98c5ec5bc2b10148df397e2bd7adfc3.html as well as a previous, similar answer to this question - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/from-ase-12-5-2k-page-size-to-15-7-4k-page-size/qaq-p/9429559.

entry.title: Re: Favorite book and SAP Community Readers?
entry.content:
My favorite books is always the last book I read, which is an old one about a nurse from the 1970's working in an urban hospital:

https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/919280.Nurse

and Jackie as Editor:

https://www.jackieaseditor.com/jackie_as_editor_103668.htm

It was interesting for me to read how a former first lady of the US who witnessed her husband's assassination re-entered the work force at age 46 during the 1970's when she didn't have to do so.

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content:
I typically don't put destination information in the init_data section of the service instance, but in a dedicated content module. I assume the content module is able to interpret the token settings whereas the init_data is not.

I suggest you create your destinations via a separate module in the mta, like this:

modules:
  - ...
  - name: custapp-destination-content
    type: com.sap.application.content
    requires:
      - name: custapp-destination
        parameters:
          content-target: true
      - name: srv-api
      - name: custapp-auth
        parameters:
          service-key:
            name: custapp-auth-key
    parameters:
      content:
        instance:
          destinations:
            - Name: custapp-api
              Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
              TokenServiceInstanceName: custapp-auth
              TokenServiceKeyName: custapp-auth-key
              URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
              HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
              WebIDEEnabled: true
              WebIDEUsage: odata_gen
          existing_destinations_policy: update

entry.title: Re: Error when creating webi report using Google BigQuery Open connection
entry.content: Hello, could you please help? Thank you

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content:
I also tried this, but it did not work either, when I tried this I get the same error that I got with the previous suggestion:

 


GET request to /custapp/odata/v4/service/cust/$metadata?sap-language=EN completed with status 500 Failed to exchange token: Request failed with status code 401 - invalid_client - Bad credentials, token details - {"subdomain":"XXX-XXX","clientId":"sb-launchpad-XXX-XXX-XXX!t999999","expiration":1724461823,"roleCollections":["Subaccount Administrator","Connectivity and Destination Administrator"]}, external service credentials details - identityzone: XXX-XX clientid: sb-clonec69da83832c64096b2ac8d7b2acc26d9XXXXXXX|destination-xsappname!b62

 

my understanding is that even that I am telling my destination to use the authorization credentials of my custapp service, it is using the credentianls of my external/standalone approuter, it is what I see at "clientId":"sb-launchpad-XXX-XXX-XXX!t99999", this clientid is the one of my standalone app router.

entry.title: Settlement of R & D Projects
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a query about periodic settlement of R & D Projects.

If the R & D is a success then it would be developed as a Prototype.

If it is a failure then all cost settles to Cost Center.

How can I capture periodic Settlement of this.

Should I settle to Cost Center irrespective of developing an Asset.

Thanks in Advance.

Kehkashan A J

I tried the + sign as well as created a new BEx prompt and renamed the entire title to have no spaces or special characters and still no luck. There aren't any issues with %20 in lsS, only in lsR. Also webi itself write the formula with %20.

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content: Then something might be wrong in your project because this approach works 100%. Are you able to share the complete mta.yaml file?

entry.title: Modify Outbound File Resulting from Standard Payment File Structure
entry.content:
Is it possible to import a "UK BACS Domestic Payment" format transformation and make few corrections on the format so that it can be accepted by HSBC Bank standards since the standard delivered format is not accepted by the bank?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Modify Outbound File Resulting from Standard Payment...
entry.content:
The Partner/Customer can make the desired changes to a file structure using the Payment Flexibility tool. However, the Standard SAP delivered format cannot be edited, but it has to be recreated from scratch.

You can define your own Payment File Format if the SAP standard file format is not supported. For more information, please check the SAP Help Documents links provided below:

Create a New Payment File Structure | SAP Help Portal

Creating User-Defined Payment File Formats | SAP Help Portal

You can evaluate the feasibility of editing the outbound file (generated with standard payment structure) via a custom add/PDI.

From the Studio, it is possible to update the file content of the generated file through the following path:  CompanyPaymentFileRegister (BO) --> OutgoingFile (Node) --> OutgoingFileAttachmentFolder (Node) --> Document (Node) --> FileContent (node) --> BinaryObject

Please refer to the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3146113

entry.title: Re: Certify Your Skills as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Consultant
entry.content:
Hi Dieter,

I have completed these SAP Learning Journeys that are required for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting:

1. Outlining the Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA

2. Outlining the Record to Report Process in SAP S/4HANA

3. Describing the Receivables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

4. Describing the Payables Management Process in SAP S/4HANA

5. Performing Asset Accounting Processes in SAP S/4HANA

6. Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I have completed all of the quiz questions for each learning journey and extensively studied the questions to a point where I can answer all the quiz questions with a 100% score.

I just attempted the sample questions provided on the certification page, and I found that they were extremely difficult and much different than the quiz questions for the required learning journeys.

I would like to ask everyone, if you think that being able to answer all of the quiz questions sucessfully is enough to pass the certification exam?

I would also like to ask everyone, if you can recommend some additional free study materials to better prepare for C_S4CFI_2402 - SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Financial Accounting?

After extensively studying all of the quiz questions, I was very confident to take the certification exam, but after attempting the 8 exam practice questions, I am now unsure if I am properly prepared for the certification exam.

@Dieter_Voll Could you please give me your assessment of whether the Learning Journeys that I have listed above, have prepared me well for the certification? Should I look for additional preparation materials?

Thank you for any advice you can provide.

Hi ABAP Experts,

While executing the program RKO7CO88 with the input at the selection screen, I am getting the error as highlighted in yellow.

I tried debugging and found that error is coming from this subroutine.

Error is happening because ld_real = 0 and other conditions as below screenshot is satisfying.

My query is

1. Is there any configuration set up which is not maintained as a result we are getting this error.

2. Is there any other way to resolve this error? We are in S/4 HANA system.

Thank you! 😊

entry.title: Connection to SAP Power Designer Repository Database
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to switch from SQL authentication to Windows authentication for connecting to the repository?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Connection to SAP Power Designer Repository Database
entry.content:
Hello,

Setting up PowerDesigner for direct access, a repository definition is created and either an ODBC machine data source or an ODBC file data source is selected.

To change from SQL authentication to Windows authentication for an ODBC data source in the Windows ODBC Administrator, you can follow these steps:

1. Open the Windows ODBC Administrator by searching for "ODBC" in the Windows search bar and clicking on "ODBC Data Sources (64-bit)".

2. In the ODBC Data Source Administrator, go to the "System DSN" or "User DSN" tab, depending on where your data source is listed.

3. Select the data source you want to edit and click the "Configure" or "Edit" button.

4. In the connection settings for the data source, move to the wizard page where the authentication method is specified.

5. Change the authentication method from "SQL Authentication" to "Windows Authentication" or "Integrated Windows Authentication".

6. Save your changes and close the ODBC Data Source Administrator.

After making these changes, your ODBC data source will use Windows authentication instead of SQL authentication for connections.
Keep in mind that you may need to have appropriate Windows credentials set up for the user account that will be accessing the data source.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: how to update startdate and duedate fields in product...
entry.content:
Hi Y-Yusuf,

I haven't checked it. However, you can try with the template for OWOR table.

Only the header template should be sufficient.

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

I'm trying to validate a UDF with a link to ORSC (Resource Master Data), but this object is not appearing in the system objects list.

Is there a procedure to update the list?

Thanks,

Arão

entry.title: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Another Year with our U.S. Tax Reporter Year End blog. This blog will be updated with tips, best practices and, SAP Notes related to this subject.

ASUG Webcast

ASUG Webcast: HCM U.S. Payroll and Tax Reporting 2024 Year End Update 

Data: October 23, 2024

Time: 10:30 a.m. Pacific Time (12:30 p.m. Eastern Time)

Duration: 1 hour and 30 minutes

Speakers: Viswanath Ramamurthy (Product Manager); Attreyee Banerjee (Product Manager); Boris Cruz (Product Owner)

Abstract: This presentation will provide an annual update for SAP customers on SAP HCM U.S. Payroll, Benefits, Tax and Tax Reporter solutions with focus on Legal Changes and Enhancements. We will also have product experts, developers and product support on the webcast actively answering to your submitted questions.

Note: The registration link will be added here once the ASUG event gets published.

Year End Notes

3505230 – U.S. Tax Reporter Year End 2024 Announcement (to be released soon)
3507437 – Year End 2024 Phase I for U.S. Tax Reporter (to be released soon)
3505579 – W-2 / 1099-R Forms, Envelopes and PR Approval letter for year 2024 (to be released soon)

User Guides and Resources

2464078 – TR: 1099-R User Guides for HCM US Tax Reporter configuration
2464161 – TR: W-2 User Guides for HCM US Tax Reporter configuration
2463999 – TR: Tax Reporter User Guides for HCM US Tax Reporter configuration
1406971 – FAQ: Troubleshooting PDF Forms in US Tax Reporter
544849 – FAQ: Tax Reporter Note
How to find Magnetic Media Line value in Tax Reporter
How to find particular Box value in Tax Reporter
How to test W-2 Online Services - ESS

KBAs (Knowledge Base Articles)

3081097 – KBAs (Knowledge Base Articles) for Payroll USA

Educational Videos

2480185 – TR: Tax Reporter – Online W-2 Enhancements videos

In addition, you can find detailed Tax Reporter documentation on SAP Help Portal. under HCM Local Version for the United States. 

If you have questions about 2024 Year-End Tax Reporting, you can post it in the comment area of this blog.

Kind regards,
Graziela

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content:
yes, here is the mta.yaml of my service:

 

_schema-version: '3.1'
ID: custapp
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx -p /cds-dk cds build --profile production
modules:
  - name: custapp-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
      disk-quota: 512M
      memory: 512M
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url} 
    requires:
      - name: custapp-auth
      - name: custapp-destination
      - name: custapp-db
      - name: custapp-logging
# ----------------- HANA DB DEPLOYER  --------------------------------
  - name: custapp-db-deployer
# ------------------------------------------------------------------    
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
    requires:
      - name: custapp-db
# ----------------- Destinations  --------------------------------      
  - name: custapp-destination-content
    type: com.sap.application.content
    build-parameters:
      no-source: true
    requires:
     - name: custapp-destination
       parameters:
        content-target: true
     - name: srv-api
     - name: custapp-auth
       parameters:
        service-key:
          name: custapp-auth-key
    parameters:
      content:
        instance:
         destinations:
          - Name: custapp-api
            Authentication: OAuth2UserTokenExchange
            TokenServiceInstanceName: custapp-auth
            TokenServiceKeyName: custapp-auth-key
            URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
            HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
            WebIDEEnabled: true
            WebIDEUsage: odata_gen
         existing_destinations_policy: update        
 # --------------------- WEBAPP CONTENT DEPLOYER ----------------------
  - name: custapp-app-content
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    type: com.sap.application.content
    path: .
    requires:
      - name: custapp-destination
      - name: custapp-html-repo-host
        parameters:
          content-target: true
    build-parameters:
      build-result: resources
      requires:
        - artifacts:
            - custappapp.zip
          name: custapp-app-webapp
          target-path: resources/
  # ---------------------- BOARD UI MODULE  ----------------------------
  - name: custapp-app-webapp
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    type: html5
    path: app/custapp-app
    build-parameters:
      build-result: dist
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm install
        - npm run build:cf
      supported-platforms:
        []
resources:
  - name: custapp-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: custapp-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: dedicated
      service-keys:  
        - name: custapp-auth-key  #need this to create the service key    
  
  - name: custapp-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    requires:
     - name: srv-api
    parameters:
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite
      config: 
        HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
        init_data:
          instance:
            existing_destinations_policy: update
            destinations:
            - Authentication: NoAuthentication
              Name: ui5
              ProxyType: Internet
              Type: HTTP
              URL: https://ui5.sap.com
  - name: custapp-db
    type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
    parameters:
      service: hana
      service-plan: hdi-shared
    # ----------------- HTML5 REPO----------------------------------------
  - name: custapp-html-repo-host 
  # ------------------------------------------------------------------
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: html5-apps-repo
      service-plan: app-host 
  # ---------------- APPLICATION LOGGING SERVICE ---------------
  - name: custapp-logging
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: application-logs
      service-name: custapp-logging-${space}
      service-plan: lite

 

 

and this is the mtal.yaml of my app router:

 

_schema-version: "3.1"
ID: launchpad
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
modules:
  - name: launchpad
    type: approuter.nodejs
    path: .
    parameters:
      keep-existing-routes: true
      disk-quota: 768M
      memory: 768M
    requires:
      - name: launchpad-approuter-auth
      - name: custapp-destination
      - name: launchpad-approuter-html5-runtime
      - name: launchpad-logging

resources:
  - name: custapp-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.existing-service    
  # ---------------- APPLICATION LOGGING SERVICE ---------------
  - name: launchpad-logging
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: application-logs
      service-name: launchpad-logging-${space}
      service-plan: lite
  # ---------------- AUTHORIZATION SERVICE ---------------
  - name: launchpad-approuter-auth
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    parameters:
      path: ./xs-security.json
      service-plan: application
      service: xsuaa
      config:
        xsappname: launchpad-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: dedicated
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  # ---------------- HTML5 RUNTIME ---------------
  - name: launchpad-approuter-html5-runtime
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: launchpad-approuter-html5-runtime
      service-plan: app-runtime
      service: html5-apps-repo

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the SAP Enterprise Architecture Community Group!
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am new joiner to this group. Super exciting to find this group. 

Hope that I can contribute something to the group and learn from all of experts like you. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Special character # -issue in the file generated
entry.content:
Hello,

The # character at the end of each line in your flat file could be due to an encoding or line-ending issue during the conversion process in SAP Integration Suite. To fix this, you may adjust the mapping in Integration Suite to stop this character from being added or ensure that the file transfer to AL11 doesn’t introduce this issue.

To adjust the # character issue in SAP Integration Suite, check message mapping, use a Content Modifier to remove it, ensure proper file encoding, and validate through testing. Since the ABAP code can’t be changed, it's important to get the file format right before it gets processed

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: Great work as always @graziela! Wishing for an excellent Year End for all of us 🙂

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:
Hello community, 

I have published the blog:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/u-s-tax-reporter-year-end-2024/ba-p/13799719

Some notes will be released today or on Monday.

Kind regards,
Graziela

entry.title: Hello Friends, I am very excited to be here.
entry.content: I am looking to switch my careers to Supply Chain Management in mid-life.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@Sreenith 

Thanks for asking!
For several reasons the user "SAP_WFRT" (as a successor of the old "WF-BATCH") does not exist by default.

Please check either (just a few samples of multiple discussions and blogs about setting up modern/flex workflow):
https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-q-a/regarding-wf-batch/qaq-p/445070
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/troubleshooting-flexible-workflow-issues/ba-p/13575873 

or 
SAP KBS Note: 1574002: WF-BATCH Authorizations (you need to have a SAP Service User)

In short:
Create the technical user "SAP_WFRT", assign role "SAP_BC_BMT_WFM_SERV_USER_PLV01" and maintain the overall user data 😃 

Best Stephan

entry.title: Budget assignment to a compensation group
entry.content:
I am kindly asking how I can assign a budget to a compensation group. I have already created the group and assigned users to it & and I have created a budget based on group. Yet I cannot find the budget amount/section on the form.

I would really appreciate your help with this.

entry.title: Re: CAP - CDS REPL to connect to db {kind : hana}
entry.content:
Are you not specifying --profile hybrid option for cds bind? The profile hybrid is not activated.

Which cds version are you using? With v8, one should see { impl: '@cap-js/hana' }.

entry.title: Re: OPEN DATASET syntax for Unicode and non-Unicode, mixe...
entry.content: This solution was marked as an "accepted solution" but it leads to a syntax error/doesn't compile, so I revert the solution flag. Please don't mislead other people. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: Is it possible to run a program or background job only on individual PC?
entry.content: ABAP programs can run only on an ABAP server, not a laptop.

entry.title: Re: Favorite book and SAP Community Readers?
entry.content:
Maybe it's time to bring back the SAP Community book club! It's been more than 4 years since the last one, but @TammyPowlas and I were regulars. She even introduced me to new authors.
https://x.com/workjerryjanda/status/1242089278408138758

entry.title: Re: How to read XML string passed as input parameter to HANA stored procedure ?
entry.content:
Please format the SQL with </> to make it more legible e.g.

PROCEDURE "sp_timesheetdata"(
    IN  XMLSTRING VARCHAR(5000)
)
   LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
   SQL SECURITY INVOKER
   --DEFAULT SCHEMA <default_schema_name>
   READS SQL DATA AS
BEGIN
DECLARE tempTable TABLE(ID VARCHAR(50), END_DATE VARCHAR(50), WORKORDER VARCHAR(50));

INSERT INTO :tempTable(ID,END_DATE,WORKORDER)
SELECT ID,END_DATE,WORKORDER FROM
XMLTABLE('resultset/row' PASSING  '<resultset>
<row>
<ID>12345</ID>
<DATE>2024-08-30 00:00:00</DATE>
<ORDER>273498</ORDER>
</row>
  <row>
  <ID>56789</ID>
  <DATE>2024-06-21 00:00:00</DATE>
  <ORDER>60657</ORDER>
  </row>
</resultset>'
   COLUMNS
   ID VARCHAR(50) PATH 'ID',
   DATE VARCHAR(50) PATH 'DATE',
   ORDER VARCHAR(50) PATH 'ORDER'
   ) as XTABLE;

   SELECT * FROM :tempTable; -- used in joins further

entry.title: Re: how to set a constant attribute to strans xml transformation?
entry.content: Why would you want to define a namespace as a variable? Transformations refer 99.9% of the time to fixed namespaces. If you want a special transformation, completely dynamic, use XSLT.

entry.title: Re: how do i activate colors and rownumbers in abap on s4?
entry.content: In WebGUI, the ABAP editor is very limited, as explained in the SAP notes. You must use the WinGUI if you want to have these features.

entry.title: Searching for a Fixed Asset with Known Master Data attributes
entry.content: In the AS03 screen, the default search for a fixed asset is performed by entering the Asset number (also requires the company Code).  By jumping through some hoops, you can figure out how to search by Inventory Number (does not require the Company Code?), but sometimes you need to search for an asset with only knowing other Master Data attributes, such as the Serial Number of the Asset.  How does one perform a search for an asset in AS03 if only the Serial Number is known?  SAPECC 6.07 SPS22

entry.title: Custom ABAP CDS Views in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Three parts to this question

1. Can I extend a standard ABAP CDS and create a custom ABAP CDS view on top of it and expose it as OData Service (Consumption view) so it can be consumed in SAP SAC?

2. Can I create a fully customizable CDS view all the way (Basic, Composite and Consumption views) and expose it as OData Service for SAP SAC?

3. To expose as OData Service is there a specific Fiori Tile similar to /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE exist in SAP Public Cloud?

Thank you,

Arthur

entry.title: Re: Steps to activate workflow and external notifications on SAP S/4HANA.
entry.content: Hi Karin, Did you get any tutorial/guide to implement external notification?

entry.title: Start your migration to SAP HANA Cloud now!
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud, a cloud-native database solution, is the top choice for developers creating intelligent data applications that prioritize successful business processes, enhanced user experiences, and elevated analytics. It is an all-in-one solution that underpins modern applications and analytics sturdily and cost-effectively. As the cloud-based data foundation for SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), it orchestrates mission-critical applications and analytics across your enterprise data in one comprehensive solution.

SAP HANA Cloud was built to support the most innovative applications. In addition, SAP HANA Cloud is key for supporting SAP customers’ clean core strategies, as a side-by-side solution for offloading custom objects and applications.

The time is now to move to SAP HANA Cloud.  So, the question is, how do you get there?

The SAP Migration Factory for SAP BTP program is a high-touch, concierge-model consulting service that puts you on the fast track toward realizing the advantages of SAP HANA Cloud. Expert guidance services are delivered remotely by seasoned teams from SAP or approved SAP partners. The program is a global initiative to assist customers with architecture optimization, modernization risk management, and end-to-end migration strategy to SAP HANA Cloud.  The result is a modernized IT landscape optimized for intelligence. 

Benefits and services include:

  • Free migration assessments that can produce business cases, detailed statements of work, and estimates of effort and cost
  • Modernization of data landscape with SAP HANA Cloud to empower your intelligent enterprise
  • Low-risk migration with defined services and expertise
  • Rapid realization of value through tools, assets, and proven methods expediting migration
  • Support provided by highly skilled and experienced experts on migration to SAP HANA Cloud

SAP and its partners offer a range of additional options for services, support, tools, and assets that can put you on the fast track to database modernization.  Explore them online or via our comprehensive brochure.

To learn more about SAP's database migration program and to get started, customers can check out the resources linked to above, speak with their SAP Account Executive or reach out to migrationfactory@sap.com.

It's time to begin the journey to modernization and digital transformation today!

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content: This (terrible lite mode) is now happening post August 2024 patch anytime we provide URL's to users for an OVM story that do not contain the hint mentioned by David3030 above i.e. mode=embed, it does not happen if the story is navigated to directly by the users or via the search function. Will be opening a bug ticket asap as this mode removes in cell chart formatting and icons, thresholding and affects dimension input controls visibility in the story regardless of how they are labeled or brought to the front.

entry.title: SBPA: Decision step in Process fails with error destination 'bpmworkflowruntime_rule' not found
entry.content:
I modeled a Process with a Decision step in SAP Build Process Automation tenant in my trial account in us10. When the process is executed, the Decision step fails. I find the following error message in monitor.

 

Rule Service Id:
5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979
Rule Service Version:
000001000000000000
Error message:
The destination 'bpmworkflowruntime_rule' could not be found in tenant with subdomain 'xxxx'. Create it or check the spelling.
Log ID:
00a116ea-ed45-40b6-be8b-f11f3ea-us10

 

I could not find any documentation on how to configure this destination. I tried configuring this destination like what is mentioned in the documentation for sap_process_automation_service. Now the error message changed to:

 

Rule Service Id:
5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979
Rule Service Version:
000001000000000000
Error message:
The HTTP request to 'https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/rules-service/rest/v2/rule-services/5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979/versions/000001000000000000' failed with status code 404 (Not Found) and response body '{"timestamp":1724432145560,"path":"/rules-service/rest/v2/rule-services/5701c05935dc42a5b302c27ff8398979/versions/000001000000000000","status":404,"error":"Not Found","message":null,"requestId":"6c60e980-1842992"}'.
Log ID:
1ea78a17-4443-4aa3-aca9-dee1b8e-us10

 

The path prefix of the requested URL appears wrong. It should have been `/public/rule/runtime/rest`; `/rules-service/rest`is from Business Rules (Workflow Management). 

How can I resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Lucas Araujo, and I am from Brazil.

 

I am currently working in the MM module.

 

I am learning the MM module and seeking professional growth.

 

I really would like to have this opportunity to improve my skills and get more chances to grow in my career. I do a lot of research and I am currently studying and practicing my knowledge in this area. I really appreciate to be part of this community and I hope to contribute and learn a lot!

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: A bit of a fudge but:

entry.title: Re: How to engage shoppers with iPhones, Android or Windows Phone
entry.content:
Hallow SAP Community,

Engaging shoppers across different platforms—whether they are using iPhones, Android devices, or Windows Phones—requires a strategic approach that emphasizes added value through innovation. Retailers must understand the unique features and preferences of each platform to deliver a seamless shopping experience. This involves optimizing mobile apps, ensuring compatibility, and personalizing content to suit the user's device. By focusing on these elements, retailers can create a compelling value proposition that not only attracts but retains customers. For the most intuitive and cutting-edge mobile shopping experience, I recommend using iOS devices, which offer unparalleled integration with retail apps and services.

Thanks For Regards...!!

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content: Tunir if you want to make this the default setting for OVM stories that's fine, but give us a nice enable / disable checkbox in story properties to turn this on and off.

entry.title: Re: Let’s Fill the Office with Action Figures!
entry.content: @Zamichiei ciertoo, faltó mi dino.  El fantasmita es uno de mis favoritos 👻

entry.title: Unifying Your Business Operations: Integrating SAP Build Work Zone with SAP Business One
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced business environment, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) need more than just robust ERP systems to stay competitive. they need integrated digital workspaces that unify access to all their critical applications. SAP Build Work Zone, when integrated with SAP Business One, offers a powerful solution to streamline operations, enhance collaboration, and boost productivity. This blog post provides an overview of SAP Build Work Zone and its use cases for SAP Business customers, as well as the overview of this integration, concluding with recommended e-learning resources for those interested in exploring the details further.

 

SAP Build Work Zone Overview

SAP Build Work Zone is a digital workplace solution that offers a unified, role-based user experience, integrating applications, content, and processes in a single interface. It comes in two editions:

 

SAP Build Work Zone Use cases

For SAP Business One customers, where often only about 10% of employees use the ERP system, there's an opportunity for partners to extend their reach by targeting the non-ERP users and even non-Employee users with Work Zone solutions. Traditionally, these users have relied on third-party or custom-built solutions. In addition, SAP Work Zone Standard Edtion can complement other BTP apps and services, particularly since it is included at no additional cost with Build Apps and Build Process Automation.

The Advanced Edition is also a cost-effective option for replacing third-party groupware or intranet/extranet solutions.

This approach enables partners to generate recurring cloud revenue and additional income from contents and services.

 

Integration with SAP Business One

This illustrates the Build Work Zone demo site, featuring tiles and cards.

  • HR Space includes the Employee Self-Service page with two tile apps:
    • Employee Lookup app - built with SAP Build Apps
    • Employee Store Apps - 3rd party UI5 app
  • Sales Space contains two pages:
    • Overview Page features ...
      • Company dashboard - brought from SAP Analytics Cloud Story
      • Business Partners app - built with SAP Build Apps
    • Sales Processing Page is divided into two sections “Sales Orders” and “Invoicing”, each hosting ...
      • Business One Web Client URL app - opens SAP Business One Web Client Views
      • UI Integration card - built with SAP Business Application Studio with no-code manner. it displays the most-concise pieces of business data and enable straightforward and decisive user action in a limited-space container, helping users structure their work in an intuitive and dynamic way.

 

This site was configured with the view mode "Space and Pages – New Experience" to host UI integration cards. 

 

Then how to create a tile and card in a site? Here are three ways to manage business contents in a site.

 

Overview of Step-by-Step Process to create the above demo site in Build Work Zone standard edition, integrated with SAP Business One

Prerequisites

  1. Maintain a destination to represent SAP Business One service layer in BTP subaccount.
  2. Configure SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication (IAS) to let IAS users work as business users across the different systems with single sign-on. 
  3. Optionally create applications in the SAP IAS admin console for SAP Business One if you want to achieve single sign-on with SAP Business One Web Client.

Configuration steps

  1. Create the Work Zone standard edition in BTP subaccount.
  2. Prepare for apps for Tiles and Cards for the above demo site.
    • Create applications in Build Apps and/or Business Application Studio and deploy them to HTML5 repository (the managed router created by Build Work Zone) in the BTP subaccount.
    • Create UI integration cards and build a content package for UI integration cards in Business Application Studio.
    • Create a SAP Analytics Cloud Story.
  3. Create a new site in the Build Work Zone Site Manager
  4. Create the 1st space for HR 
  5. Create the 2nd space for sales and its 1st page
  6. Deploy the content package for the UI integration cards to Work Zone and assign the role
  7. Create the 2nd page for the sales space, including UI integration cards

 

Conclusion and Call-to-action

Integrating SAP Build Work Zone with SAP Business One provides a powerful solution for SMEs looking to unify their IT environments, enhance productivity, and improve business agility. With its flexible capabilities, role-based access, and mobile readiness, SAP Build Work Zone is an essential tool for businesses aiming to streamline their operations and empower their employees and business partners.

For the detailed step-by-step guides on how to implement this integration and explore its full potential, access the e-learning course on the SAP PartnerEdge portal (S-user required) : 

  • Presentation
  • Step-by-step video
  • How to create UI Integration Cards exercise

entry.title: Data Templates for DDS: Expense Administration SAC Story
entry.content:
Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Service Expense

SAP Travel & Expense: Expense Administration SAC Story

This story offers a comprehensive analysis of expenditure, outstanding spend, and workflow efficiency (based on SAP Datasphere). By integrating and visualizing spending data alongside outstanding balances, it provides insights into financial transactions and workflow performance. 

The Concur Travel & Expense Data Templates for the Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) Expense content package provides a powerful solution for visualizing and analyzing data captured in SAP Concur using SAP Analytics Cloud, facilitated by a seamless integration through SAP Data Delivery Services. With this solution, administrators can gain comprehensive insights into organizational expenses, system administration and user distributions. The advanced analytics capabilities extend to robust auditing and control features, which are critical for identifying potential fraud and ensuring compliance. Built upon Analytical Models in SAP Datasphere, this content package includes a suite of detailed stories that offer in-depth perspectives on expense management. These insights enable administrators to make informed decisions, optimize expense workflows, and enhance overall financial governance. 

Spend Analysis Page 

This dashboard offers a comprehensive overview of your company's financial landscape by presenting key metrics related to combined spend from expense reports. It serves as a centralized hub for monitoring and analyzing financial performance, aiding in strategic decision-making and budget management.  

  • Trend Analysis: Allowing to analyze trends for the Top 3 Expense Types Over Time (based on Sent for Payment Date)  
  • Top 10 Expense Type: Presenting a breakdown of Expenses per Expense Type.  
  • Top Payment Types: Revealing key insights into payment preferences.  
  • Total Spend per Vendor: Providing top vendors analysis.  
  • Top 10 Spending Employees: identifying highest spenders within a company.   
  • Spend Details: Providing a comprehensive breakdown of expenses, categorized by Spend Category and accompanied by respective expense claims and claiming employees.  
  • Associated Key Performance Indicators: 1) Total Spend: displaying Total Approved Amount according to a selected time period. 2) # Processed reports: displaying the number of reports that were approved and sent for payment.  

Outstanding Spend

This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of pending expenses across your organization. It provides key metrics related to outstanding expenses yet to be reimbursed or processed, allowing to monitor and managing accruals. By highlighting pending expenses and tracking their status, this dashboard aids in optimizing expenses and ensuring timely reimbursement, thereby contributing to better financial and resource management.  

  • Trend Analysis: This chart offers a comprehensive analysis of trends in outstanding transactions over time.  
  • Aging Transactions: This chart displays the distribution of claims based on their associated aging in days, aiding in prioritizing and monitoring resolution and approval/processing efforts.  
  • Top Unprocessed Expense Types: This chart offers a detailed breakdown of outstanding spend per expense type, highlighting the top expense categories awaiting processing.   
  • Outstanding Expense per Merchant: This chart presents a breakdown of outstanding spend across various vendors, providing insights into top vendors for pending expenses.  
  • Top 10 Employees with Unprocessed Expense: This chart identifies the top employees with outstanding expenses, providing insights into individual spending patterns and possibility aiding in timely reimbursement and expense management.  
  • Outstanding Spend – Transactional Details: This detailed table provides a comprehensive breakdown of accrual spend, showcasing pending expenses along with its associated details namely, spend category, merchant information, employee details etc.  

Workflow Analysis

This dashboard provides an in-depth overview of your company's operational processes by presenting key metrics related to workflow efficiency and performance. It serves as a centralized hub for monitoring and analyzing the productivity and effectiveness of various workflows, aiding in process optimization and strategic decision-making.

  • Workflow Cycle: This chart provides a detailed analysis of the median number of days required to complete each step in the workflow process. 
  • Distribution of Aging Reports: This chart displays the number of reports categorized by their associated aging time, providing insights into the duration of pending reports. 
  • Claims Ever Sent Back to Employees: This chart highlights the number of claims that have been returned to employees for further action or clarification. 
  • Expense Reports within Policy: This chart illustrates the number of expense reports that comply with the company's policy guidelines, ensuring adherence to established standards. 
  • Workflow Summary: This chart provides an overview of the entire workflow process, summarizing key metrics and performance indicators to offer a holistic view of operational efficiency. 
  • Expense Reports Approval – Details: This chart provides a detailed breakdown of the expense report approval process, including key metrics on approval times, approval rates, and any pending approvals.

entry.title: Re: SAPGUI not connect
entry.content:
Did you check with niping if you can reach port 3200 on the IP address mentioned?

BR Frank

entry.title: Re: how to set a constant attribute to strans xml transformation?
entry.content: What do u mean by "namespace variable", sender is always different, xmlns is always the same, should i use xslt?

entry.title: BPC WEB member formulas - once I paste my formula and press ok part of it gets cut
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In SAP BPC WEB member formulas, once I paste my formula and press ok (I write all formulas offline and then paste them in web), part of it gets cut so when I try to process it, it does not go through. Are there limitations for the number of lines of code? The formula has a few conditions but it's not very lengthy.

Any info on the topic is much appreciated 🙂

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SUM multiple columns together
entry.content: I broke sum into two steps (WKG001 - WKG004) and (WKG005 - WKG008) and sum the intermediate and it worked.

entry.title: Re: Connecting On Premise Mail Destination and Sending Email Using SAP Cloud SDK JavaScript Version
entry.content: I have followed the full procedure. But still email is not getting sent to the email address

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content:
I've searched and searched, and tried and tried so many different things, but I need a little help to do something very simple.

I just want to embed a video into a blog post, where the video is hosted at video.sap.com. When click 'insert video' and paste the correct externally shared link I get an error:

Please enter a valid video URL. For example, a YouTube video URL might look like 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abc123', where 'abc123' is the ID of a YouTube video.

Can someone help me, please? Its not obvious to me what I'm doing wrong.

Many thanks, Matthew

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi Community members,

My name is MARK ALAN, I am from Nairobi Kenya in Africa. I am really glad to be a member of this beautiful group full of awesome and beautiful people too. I would like to make new friends all over the world. My whatsapp number is +254712330698. If you have other discussion groups please let me know.

entry.title: SAP Treasury and Risk Management full amortization schedule
entry.content:
Hello Treasury Folks,

Is there a delivered transaction within the Treasury and Risk Management solution for a complete amortization schedule? We have our bonds which typically have a premium amount that needs to be amortized over the life of the bond and monthly we use TPM1 to post the valuation for amortization.  However, for annual plans and other requests for information around our bonds, we need a full monthly amortization schedule from bond issue date to the final repayment (note we use the SAC Gross method).

Thank you,

Lisa

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: Thank You.

entry.title: SAP Certification
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm excited to announce that I am about to take my SAP certification exam! I would love to hear your tips and ideas on how I can best prepare for and pass the exam. Your support and advice mean a lot to me, so please feel free to share any strategies, resources, or insights that you think would be helpful. Thank you in advance for your input!"

Regards

Mark

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please bring in your ideas

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi @StephanieMarley nice to meet you! My area of interest is SAP SuccessFactors. I recently started in a new role as an HRIS Administrator with a company that heavily utilizes this system. Any suggestions are very welcome!

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @Sandra_Rossi:

I've passed along your feedback to our UI/UX experts for consideration. In the meantime, if you do notice people posting blog posts as questions/discussions, please let us know. I have found a few myself, and I do remove the content and instruct people on the process that they need to follow. (Sometimes the only solution is to explain to people directly.)

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: User provisioning from SAP Cloud Identity Authentication Service (IAS) to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Can SAP make it more cumbersome?  Many don't want to create employees.  Many don't want to have anything to do with SAP HR.

This is an incredibly weak argument:

"
Now, you might be wondering why would I need to provision users from IAS into S/4HANA Cloud? In step 2 of the onboarding process, aren't we doing the exact opposite?

One reason is to ensure that the S/4HANA Cloud user profile has the Global User ID populated with a value that matches the User UUID field from IAS.  The Global User ID field in the S/4HANA Cloud user profile will be empty unless we actually run a job to provision users from IAS to S/4.  The User UUID field in IAS is used by applications such as SAP Task Center to uniquely identity a user record across different SAP applications.  I covered SAP Task Center integration with S/4HANA Cloud in another blog where I also highlight the importance of the User UUID field."

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @Matthew_Shaw:

It is not possible to embed videos from our Media Share site. If you visit our SharePoint site for employees, you'll find an internal blogging handbook that offers some options for linking the Media Share videos. If you aren't sure where the site is, feel free to reach out to me directly.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: Impressão sai na ultima pagina informações do usuário
entry.content:
Boa tarde, estávamos com o mesmo problema. A cada impressão enviada pelo SAP ao finalizar a impressão saia uma ultima página com o nome do usuário, o hostname que enviou e a ID do JOB. Validei todas as configurações da impressora na transação Spad. Resolvemos olhas as configurações da impressora a laser e achamos o campo na impressora HP: LPD BANNER PAGE.

Usamos impressoras HP em nossa estrutura, seguimos o seguinte caminho: 
Entrar com admin no painel web da impressora.
Entrar no campo de configuração NETWORKING.
Ir ao campo TCP Settings, e na aba advanced desative a opção LPD BANNER PAGE.

Está ação resolveu o problema com impressoras modelo HP, verifique se existe essa opção na Vendor do modelo da impressora.

entry.title: The Toggling Dilemma – INS & OVR in the SAP GUI !!
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Today, we will be discussing on an interesting Topic in my short blog :  INS, OVR Toggling (Default setting)

Ref:- 

INS:- Insert

OVR:- Overwrite 

The standard behaviour of the SAP GUI : regarding the toggling of INS & OVR in the SAP GUI is that it picks the last used setting of the GUI.

There is no process as such to make a default setting regarding the INS or OVR, we have to manually toggle between them as per our data screen requirements.

But, there is a way around to make INS or OVR (any one which you want to make default for your SAP GUI), for which, you have to tweak the Windows Registry

if,

key HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend

Server\Customize\Edit.InsertMode is set to 1, then you have the INS mode; and if 0: then you are having OVR mode.

 

So, in this way, by tweaking the Windows Registry Settings, we can for the SAP GUI to open itself in a particular INS or OVR mode. 

After completing these steps, simply restart your SAP GUI, it will now start in the default mode, that you have tweaked in the windows registry...

 

Blog Written By:-

Er. Pratik Das

B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering,

SAP Functional Consultant,

SAP Enthusiast.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP Action - Error -Target was not found
entry.content:
jaydip_odiya
how i can solve please help me out Target was not found. "sap.nw.core.feap.odatav2::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details::Portal_Details--Portal Details::Syid::Field" is not a valid ID.


To Answer your question:
Remove "@UI.facet:  Annotation's"  in your Metadata file.
